content: Mongoose pre/post hooks: 4 categories (document, query, model, aggregate). Pre hooks execute serially; async-aware via promise/async-await; halt pipeline on error (throw, rejected promise, or async throw). Post hooks: 2-param signature adds explicit next(); async zero-param auto-awaited. Error-handling post: special 3-param (err, doc, next) form for error transformation. Multiple handlers per event registered in order. All hooks must be registered before model compilation via mongoose.model(). Option middleware:false skips user hooks. Pre errors block hooked function and reject returned promise.
